title: mandioca dulcis
intro: Mandioca dulcis, also known as manioc or yuca, is a starchy root vegetable native to South America that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mandioca dulcis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and regulating blood sugar levels. Mandioca dulcis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
